stories.title: All-Star Starters Revealed Tonight — FOX 7:30 PM ET
stories.angle: Phase 2 voting closed July 2. The complete 2026 All-Star starting lineups are revealed tonight at 7:30 PM ET on FOX. Bobby Witt Jr. led Phase 2 SS voting at 72% — if it holds, he becomes the third Royals shortstop to start the Midsummer Classic. Yordan Alvarez (OPS 1.031) led at DH. Freddie Freeman led at 1B with 59%. Ohtani (NL DH) and Clement (AL 2B) are automatic starters. Full rosters revealed July 6. Game July 14 at Citizens Bank Park.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The 2026 MLB All-Star starters are revealed TONIGHT on FOX at 7:30 PM ET.

Bobby Witt Jr. led Phase 2 SS voting at 72%. Alvarez leads at DH (OPS 1.031). Freeman leads 1B at 59%.

Ohtani and Clement are already in. Who joins them?

#MLB #AllStar

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Bobby Witt Jr. has never started an All-Star Game.

He's led SS voting at 72% in Phase 2. Tonight on FOX at 7:30 PM ET, we find out if that finally changes.

Three years. Three close calls. Tonight.

#MLB #AllStar #Royals

article.headline: 2026 All-Star Starters Revealed Tonight: Witt Jr., Alvarez, Freeman Lead Phase 2 into FOX Broadcast

research.facts:
All-Star Starters Reveal Tonight
**Search results summary:**
- Full 2026 All-Star rosters revealed tonight (July 4) at 7:30 PM ET on FOX — the "MLB All-Star Game Selection Show presented by KONAMI"
- Shohei Ohtani (NL DH, 3,341,257 Phase 1 votes) — automatic starter
- Ernie Clement (AL 2B, 3,232,932 Phase 1 votes) — automatic starter
- Phase 2 voting closed July 2, noon ET
- Phase 2 leaders as of last public update:
- AL SS: Bobby Witt Jr. (Royals) 72% over Andrés Giménez (Blue Jays) 28%
- NL DH: Yordan Alvarez — OPS 1.031, leading DH race
- NL 1B: Freddie Freeman (Dodgers) 59% — streak of All-Star appearances extending to 10
- Witt Jr. has never started an All-Star Game (lost Phase 2 to Henderson in 2024, Wilson in 2025)
- Full 32-player rosters (starters + reserves + pitchers) announced July 6
- Game: July 14, 2026, Citizens Bank Park, Philadelphia; FOX broadcast
- Cam Schlittler confirmed as AL starting pitcher (from prior pipeline)
**Confidence ratings:**
- Ohtani/Clement auto starters [HIGH — multiple confirmed sources]
- Witt Jr. 72% Phase 2 SS lead [HIGH — MLB.com Phase 2 update confirmed]
- Alvarez OPS 1.031 [HIGH — MLB stats]
- Freeman 59% at 1B [HIGH — MLB.com Phase 2 update]
- All-Star reveal tonight 7:30 PM FOX [HIGH — MLB.com confirmed]
- Game July 14 Citizens Bank Park [HIGH — confirmed]

stories.title: Home Run Derby Field — Schwarber In, Caminero In, Field Nearly Set
stories.angle: Kyle Schwarber (MLB-leading 30+ HR) confirmed participation conditional on making the All-Star team (announcement tonight). Junior Caminero (Tampa Bay Rays) was the first confirmed competitor. Derby at Citizens Bank Park July 13, streaming on Netflix — first time Derby on a streaming platform. Field still adding participants as All-Star rosters are finalized. New Derby format adds stakes.

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Kyle Schwarber is in the Home Run Derby.

30+ HR, MLB's best power hitter, playing in his home ballpark at Citizens Bank Park. July 13 on Netflix.

If he wins, Philly goes electric.

#MLB #HomeRunDerby #Phillies

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Junior Caminero and Kyle Schwarber are in the Home Run Derby.

July 13. Citizens Bank Park. Netflix.

The field is filling up. Tonight's All-Star reveal will confirm who else is in.

#MLB #HomeRunDerby

article.headline: Schwarber and Caminero Head a 2026 Home Run Derby Field Built for a Big Moment

research.facts:
Home Run Derby Field
**Search results summary:**
- Junior Caminero (Tampa Bay Rays) — first confirmed Derby competitor (confirmed June 30)
- 2025: Derby runner-up (lost 18-15 in final to Cal Raleigh)
- 2026: Leading MLB with approximately 28 HR
- Kyle Schwarber (Philadelphia Phillies) — confirmed participation IF he's healthy and makes All-Star team
- MLB-leading 30+ HR going into July 4
- Two-time prior Derby participant
- Would be playing in his home ballpark at Citizens Bank Park
- Derby at Citizens Bank Park, July 13, 2026
- First time Derby airs on Netflix — streaming premiere
- Yordan Alvarez reportedly declined Derby participation
- Field still being finalized; additional participants expected after tonight's All-Star roster reveal
**Confidence ratings:**
- Caminero confirmed Derby [HIGH — CBS Sports/MLB.com]
- Schwarber participation conditional on roster [HIGH — SI.com]
- Alvarez declined [MEDIUM — SI.com reporting]
- Netflix broadcast July 13 [HIGH — multiple confirmed]
- Derby at Citizens Bank Park [HIGH — confirmed]
- Schwarber 30+ HR MLB lead [HIGH — baseball stats]

stories.title: Guardians Take AL Central Lead — 4-3 Win Over White Sox on July 3
stories.angle: Cleveland Guardians beat the Chicago White Sox 4-3 on July 3 to take first place in the AL Central. Guardians 46-42, White Sox 45-41. The White Sox had been tracked as AL Central leaders through the June pipeline. This is the first standing change covered in this niche. A closely contested July series between the top two teams has now flipped the division race heading into the holiday weekend.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The Cleveland Guardians are in first place in the AL Central.

4-3 win over the White Sox on July 3 (10 innings). Guardians 46-42. White Sox 45-41.

The AL Central race just flipped.

#MLB #Guardians #ALCentral

article.headline: Guardians Take the AL Central Lead: 4-3 Win Over White Sox in 10 Innings Flips the Division

research.facts:
Guardians Take AL Central Lead
**Search results summary:**
- Guardians beat White Sox 4-3 on July 3, 2026 (in a 10-inning game)
- After win: Guardians 46-42, White Sox 45-41
- The White Sox and Guardians playing a closely contested 4-game series over July 2-4
- Division lead has shifted to Guardians — first time Guardians lead cited in this pipeline
- Previous pipeline tracking showed White Sox in AL Central lead (43-39 as of June 29)
- July 2 game: Guardians also beat White Sox 6-5 (separate result)
- Context: Detroit Tigers, Minnesota Twins, Kansas City Royals have all faltered
**Confidence ratings:**
- Guardians 4-3 win July 3 [HIGH — ESPN game recap confirmed]
- Guardians 46-42, White Sox 45-41 standings [HIGH — confirmed]
- 10-inning game [HIGH — confirmed]
- White Sox had held AL Central lead previously [HIGH — prior pipeline tracking]

stories.title: Skubal Trade — Braves Emerge as Clear Frontrunner
stories.angle: Per USA Today's Bob Nightengale, rival executives now consider the Atlanta Braves the frontrunner to acquire Tarik Skubal. The Braves' urgency: Spencer Strider remains out from injury, making a top-of-rotation addition critical for playoff contention. The package would be significant — top prospects — but the Braves have the organizational depth. August 3 deadline.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Per Bob Nightengale: the Atlanta Braves are now the frontrunners to land Tarik Skubal.

Spencer Strider is out. The Braves need a No. 1. Skubal + Sale would be the best rotation duo in baseball.

August 3 deadline.

#MLB #TradeDeadline #Braves

article.headline: Braves Emerge as Skubal Trade Frontrunners: Strider's Absence Makes the Need Urgent

research.facts:
Skubal/Braves Trade
**Search results summary:**
- Bob Nightengale (USA Today MLB insider) reported Braves as favorite for Skubal among rival executives
- Rationale: Spencer Strider out with injury creates urgent rotation need in Atlanta
- "Pairing Skubal with Chris Sale would give Braves best front of rotation duo in the game" (per analysis)
- Braves would need 2 top-10 prospects (one top-100) per earlier Tigers asking price report
- Previous pipeline: Skubal ESPN 85% trade probability, Kalshi 64% trade odds
- Trade deadline: August 3, 2026
- Other teams in market: Dodgers, Yankees, Cubs, Blue Jays, Phillies, Padres, Rangers, Rays (prior pipeline)
- Skubal 2026 stats: leading Tiger SP; two-time Cy Young winner (established from prior research)
**Confidence ratings:**
- Nightengale Braves as favorite [HIGH — USA Today report confirmed]
- Strider injury urgency [HIGH — confirmed from multiple sports sources]
- Asking price structure [MEDIUM — package reported in general terms]
- August 3 deadline [HIGH — established fact]
- 85% ESPN trade probability [HIGH — prior pipeline established]

stories.title: July 4 Baseball — FOX Doubleheader and the Day's Full Slate
stories.angle: July 4 is one of MLB's biggest broadcast days. FOX carries afternoon games plus the 2026 MLB All-Star Selection Show at 7:30 PM ET. It's a full holiday of baseball across multiple networks. Sunday all 15 games air on Peacock. The All-Star reveal embedded in the evening broadcast makes tonight's FOX programming the most-watched baseball broadcast of the summer.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Independence Day baseball is on.

FOX carries games all day. The 2026 MLB All-Star Selection Show starts at 7:30 PM ET — starters revealed live.

Sunday: all 15 games on Peacock.

It's a great weekend to be a baseball fan. 🎆

#MLB #July4

article.headline: Independence Day Baseball: All-Star Starters Revealed Tonight, Derby Next Week, Game on July 14
